title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindalco Industries - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindalco Industries - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Hindalco Industries is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindalco Industries:
Hindalco Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindalco Industries!
